title: us-water-quality-data — U.S. Water Quality Data by ZIP Code (code)
description: Code, schema definitions, and tooling for the U.S. Water Quality Data by ZIP Code dataset. Aggregates EPA SDWIS, EPA ECHO, UCMR5/PFAS, FEMA, USGS, Census ACS, CDC blood lead, and other federal/state sources into a single ZIP-level water quality dataset with composite Home Safety Scores.
